get.summary: Returns the listings for the specified Agency
get.description: This endpoint will return the listings for the specified Agency. The clients API Key must have appropriate permissions to access the specified Agency.

get.summary: Returns a list of the agencies who are a part of this corporate network.
get.description: Your API Key will need to have been given access to the corporate network being requested.

get.summary: Returns the profile details for the specified agency
get.description: The endpoint returns the profile details for the specified agency. Your API Key will need to have been given access to the agent being requested. Unclaimed agencies will return a 404 unless you have a Corporate level API Key.

get.summary: Returns the profile details for the specified agencies
get.description: The endpoint returns the profile details for the given list of agency codes. Your API Key will need to have been given access to the agencies being requested. Unclaimed agencies will not be included unless you have a Corporate level API Key.

get.summary: Returns a list of the active agents for the specified agency.
get.description: The endpoint returns the profile details for the specified agency. Your API Key will need to have been given access to the agent being requested.

get.summary: Returns the RMA agency code
get.description: The endpoint is used to exchange your external identifier for our primary key. In the case of an Agency we will send back the AgencyCode. Your API Key will need to have been given access to the agency being requested.

get.summary: Returns the Sales Reviews for the specified Agency
get.description: This endpoint will return the Sales Reviews for the specified Agency. The clients API Key must have appropriate permissions to access the specified Agency.

get.summary: Returns the consolidated sales reviews (both RateMyAgent and External reviews) for the specified Agency
get.description: This endpoint will return the consolidated sales reviews (both RateMyAgent and External reviews) for the specified Agency. The clients API Key must have appropriate permissions to access the specified Agency.

get.summary: Returns the Leasing Reviews for the specified Agency
get.description: This endpoint is only useful in specific circumstances, so only use when instructed. This endpoint will return the Leasing Reviews for the specified Agency. The clients API Key must have appropriate permissions to access the specified Agency.

get.summary: Returns the Sales Listings for the specified agent
get.description: This endpoint will return the Sales Listings for the specified Agent. The clients API Key must have appropriate permissions to access the specified agent.

get.summary: Returns the agent profile details for the specified agent
get.description: The endpoint returns the profile details for the specified agent. Your API Key will need to have been given access to the agent being requested.

get.summary: Returns agent profiles for the given list of agent codes
get.description: The endpoint returns the profile details for the given list of agent codes. Your API Key will need to have been given access to all agents being requested.

get.summary: Returns the badges for the specified agent
get.description: The endpoint returns the badge details for the specified agent. Your API Key will need to have been given access to the agent being requested.

get.summary: Returns the RMA agent code
get.description: The endpoint is used to exchange external identifiers (such as email address, or your primary keys) for our primary key. In the case of an agent we will send back the RateMyAgent AgentCode. Your API Key will need to have been given access to the agent being requested.

get.summary: Returns an agent profile, their badges, and their reviews.
Returns the Sales Reviews for the specified agent
get.description: This endpoint will return the Sales Reviews for the specified Agent. The clients API Key must have appropriate permissions to access the specified agent.

get.summary: Returns the consolidated sales reviews (both RateMyAgent and external reviews) for the specified agent
get.description: Only use this endpoint if you have been instructed to by RMA. This endpoint will return the consolidated sales reviews (both RateMyAgent and External reviews) for the specified Agent. The clients API Key must have appropriate permissions to access the specified agent.

get.summary: Returns the Leasing Reviews for the entire corporate agency group
get.description: This endpoint will return the Leasing Reviews for all agencies within the corporate group.

get.summary: Returns the Sales Reviews for the entire corporate agency group
get.description: This endpoint will return the Sales Reviews for all agencies within the corporate group.

get.summary: Returns the  consolidated sales reviews (both RateMyAgent and External reviews) for the entire corporate agency group
get.description: This endpoint will return the consolidated sales reviews (both RateMyAgent and External reviews) for all agencies within the corporate group.

post.description: This endpoint allows to upload Member information into RateMyAgent both for creation of a new member and update of an existing member.

post.summary: Updates Member information. Will not create new members
post.description: This endpoint allows uploading of Member information into RateMyAgent to update an existing member.

post.summary: Updates relationships between a member and their organization.

get.summary: Returns the mortgage broker profile details for the specified broker
get.description: The endpoint returns the profile details for the specified mortgage broker. Your API Key will need to have been given access to the broker being requested.

get.summary: Returns the Reviews for the specified mortgage broker
get.description: This endpoint will return the Reviews for the specified Mortgage Broker. The clients API Key must have appropriate permissions to access the specified broker.

post.description: This endpoint allows uploading of organization information into RateMyAgent to create/update a corresponding organization entity.
This endpoint allows uploading of organization information into RateMyAgent to update a corresponding organization entity.

post.summary: Updates relationships for an organization and all its members.

get.summary: Returns the Reviews for the specified profile.
get.description: This endpoint will return the Reviews for the specified profile. The clients API Key must have appropriate permissions to access the specified profile. Profiles include Individual, Office and Team.

get.summary: Returns customer satisfaction surveys for the agency network
get.description: This endpoint will return customer satisfaction surveys for the specified agency network. The client's API Key must have appropriate permissions to access the specified agency network.

get.summary: Returns the RateMyAgent ListingId (guid) based on an external identifier.
get.description: This endpoint allows you to exchange your external identifier for the RateMyAgent ListingId (guid). This is useful when you need to reference a listing in other API calls but only have your own external identifier.

put.summary: Creates or updates vendor/buyer details against a campaign.

ModificationDateTimeUtc.description: The date in UTC format when the address data was last modified.

ProfileImageUrl.description: URL to the main image used as an avatar.

BackgroundColor.description: Background color in HEX format. For example #FFEEDD.

TextColor.description: Text color in HEX format. For example #FFEEDD.

ModificationDateTimeUtc.description: The date in UTC format when the branding data was last modified.

Id.description: The identifier used for the source system.

SourceSystemId.description: The unique identifier in your system used to identify the source system. For example the id in your system for a MLS (MLS-001).

SourceSystemName.description: The name of the source system for this identifier. For example a MLS name (ABC MLS).

Identifier.description: An entity may have identifiers in other systems. The identifier is used to uniquely identify the entity in the source system.

Profiles.description: All Profiles associated with this review.

Id.description: The unique identifier for the member in your system.

OtherIdentifiers.description: A list of identifiers for the member in other systems. For example it could be MLS ID, TMS ID etc.

FirstName.description: The first name of the member.

LastName.description: The last name of the member.

Email.description: The email address of the member.

Mobile.description: The mobile phone number of the member.

Phone.description: The phone number of the member.

Licences.description: List of licences that the member has.

RateMyAgentRoles.description: The roles the member has in RateMyAgent.

Summary.description: Summary information about member that is displayed in RateMyAgent.

PromotionalVideoUrl.description: Promotional video full URL. For example https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ABC1234def.

Languages.description: List of languages. Values must be from list of ISO Language Names based on ISO 639-1 https://www.iso.org/standard/22109.html. You can find a list on Wikipedia but it may not be up to date https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_ISO_639-1_codes.

Specialities.description: Collection of specialities that the member may have.

ModificationDateTimeUtc.description: The date in UTC format when the member data was last modified.

Member.description: Member represents person while specific roles are set as a <see cref="T:RMA.Developers.Models.Agents.Enums.MemberRole">relation(s)</see> between Member and Organisation

MemberId.description: The unique identifier for the member in your system.

OrganizationId.description: The unique identifier for the organization in your system.

Roles.description: The roles that the member has in the organisation.

IsPrimary.description: Indicates if this is the primary relationship for the member. A member should have only one primary relationship.

MemberOrganizationRelationship.description: The relationship between Member and Organization.

Id.description: The unique identifier for the organization in your system.

OtherIdentifiers.description: A list of other identifiers for the organization. For example it could be MLS ID, TMS ID, your CRM ID etc.

Email.description: The email address of the organization.

Phone.description: The phone number of the organization.

Fax.description: The fax number of the organization.

Summary.description: The summary for the organization that is displayed in RateMyAgent.

Languages.description: List of languages. Values must be from list of ISO Language Names based on ISO 639-1 https://www.iso.org/standard/22109.html. You can find a list on Wikipedia but it may not be up to date https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_ISO_639-1_codes.

Addresses.description: List of addresses for the organization.

ModificationDateTimeUtc.description: The date in UTC format when the organization data was last modified.

IsFullRoster.description: Indicates whether a full roster of all organizations is included.

Relationships.description: A relationship between a member and an organization.

OrganizationRoster.description: List of members and the organization(s) to which they are related.

RateMyAgentRole.description: The role the member has on the RateMyAgent platform.

Profiles.description: All Profiles associated with this review.

WebsiteUrl.description: Website full URL. For example https://mywebsite.com.

TwitterProfileUrl.description: Twitter account full URL. For example https://www.twitter.com/MyProfileId.

LinkedInProfileUrl.description: LinkedIn account full URL. For example https://www.linkedin.com/in/MyProfileId.

FacebookProfileUrl.description: Facebook account full URL. For example https://www.facebook.com/MyProfileId.

InstagramProfileUrl.description: Instagram account full URL. For example https://www.instagram.com/MyProfileId.

YouTubeChannelUrl.description: YouTube channel full URL. For example https://www.youtube.com/c/MyProfileId.

BlogUrl.description: Blog full URL. For example https://www.myblog.com.

Status.description: The current status of the entity.

Bearer.description: Authorization header should be in JWT Bearer scheme. For example, include the token as follows: 'Authorization: Bearer {token}'.
